arts.ttl: Marcelo fires warning as Real Madrid hope to catch Arsenal with Man City trick
arts.sum: Of course, we don't know what will happen, we have faith and Real Madrid will come back. Although Real Madrid have themselves never returned from a three-goal aggregate deficit in the Champions League, it is a feat that has been done four times before.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mixed injury update for Real Madrid as training ground bust-up emerges
arts.sum: Arsenal are preparing for the second leg of their Champions League quarter final against Real Madrid on Wednesday after the draw with Brentford on the weekend depleted their ranks

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Madrid vs Arsenal, 2nd leg PREVIEW with ArsenalVision
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani is joined by Elliot Smith of the Arsenal Vision Podcast to discuss: Kiyan Sobhani is joined by Elliot Smith

arts.ttl: Two Items (Among Many) I Didn’t Like From Real Madrid’s 1st Leg Performance Against Arsenal
arts.sum: Rio Ferdinand put it this way last week: Real Madrid will need to score four (or five), because you have to put Arsenal down for one goal at least. What you can’t see off the ball: Arsenal have already blocked a potential pass to Vinicius knowing Real Madrid’s goal is to find him in transition if the set-piece fails, and the entire team moves to their spot so quickly, that Courtois is forced to hold on to the ball.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid team news: Los Blancos 'suffer double injury blow' ahead of Arsenal Champions League clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid suffer a double injury blow ahead of Wednesday's Champions League quarter-final second leg against Arsenal at the Santiago Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'learn' Kingsley Coman asking price as Bayern Munich outline transfer stance
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly learn how much it will take to sign Kingsley Coman from German giants Bayern Munich in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: One Arsenal star ruled out of Real Madrid clash, with another in serious doubt
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid could yet see their chances of securing a historic turnaround victory over Arsenal on Wednesday boosted by the latest personnel developments in the Gunners’ squad.…

arts.ttl: Man Utd hijack top Arsenal target after shock bid
arts.sum: Man Utd hijack top Arsenal target after shock bid FootballTransfers can confirm that Man Utd are interested in top Arsenal goalkeeper target Joan Garcia .

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Garcia shock as huge Barcelona offer made
arts.sum: All the latest Arsenal transfer news in one place, including updates on Joan Garcia, Bukayo Saka and Ollie Watkins . We can also confirm that Man Utd are keen on top Arsenal goalkeeper target Joan Garcia.

arts.ttl: Three observations from Real Madrid’s 1-0 win vs Alaves
arts.sum: Things could be improved on, of course — he is still only 22, but Camavinga showed in just one game how good he really can be. He kept going past players at will in advanced positions, and also scored a great goal to give Real Madrid the win.
